title: Chaand So Gaya
card_subtitle: Sab so rahe hain, ab tum bhi
cover_prompt: A soft watercolor illustration of a sleeping crescent moon with closed eyes, tiny birds dozing on a bare branch, a quiet still river below, muted indigo and silver palette, gentle evening hush, cozy Indian nighttime, children's book style
lyrics:
[verse]
Chaand so gaya
Taare so gaye
Chidiya so gayi
Ab tum bhi so jao

[chorus]
So ja, so ja
Sab so rahe hain
So ja, so ja
Raat aa gayi hai

[verse]
Hawa tham gayi
Ped chup ho gaye
Nadi ruk gayi
Phool band ho gaye

[chorus]
So ja, so ja
Sab so rahe hain
So ja, so ja
Tum bhi so jao
lyrics_devanagari:
[verse]
चाँद सो गया
तारे सो गए
चिड़िया सो गई
अब तुम भी सो जाओ

[chorus]
सो जा, सो जा
सब सो रहे हैं
सो जा, सो जा
रात आ गई है

[verse]
हवा थम गई
पेड़ चुप हो गए
नदी रुक गई
फूल बंद हो गए

[chorus]
सो जा, सो जा
सब सो रहे हैं
सो जा, सो जा
तुम भी सो जाओ
style_prompt: Traditional Indian lori sung in Hindi, warm female vocal with clear Hindi pronunciation, soft harmonium and acoustic guitar, 64 BPM, Hindustani classical flavor, pastoral evening, authentic Indian vocal style, not Western
